title: Example 10—Readable and Writable External Tables with XML Transformations
originalFilePath: >-
  https://github.com/warehouse-pg/whpg-docs/blob/main/docs/docs/6x/admin_guide/external/external-tables/creating-external-tables---examples/example-10-readable-and-writable-external-tables-with-xml-transformations.md
editTarget: originalFilePath

---

WarehousePG can read and write XML data to and from external tables with gpfdist. For information about setting up an XML transform, see [Transforming External Data with gpfdist and gpload](../../../load/transforming-xml-data.mdx).

**Parent topic:** [Examples for Creating External Tables](./)
